boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No distinguishing credit/reversal status in INV-VAN-076, and policy STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction evidence.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: MS-VAN-076 confirms M-4/R4 already paid via PRIOR-VAN-076, and INV-VAN-076 does not provide distinguishing credit/reversal status.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: INV-VAN-076 lacks distinguishing credit/reversal status, and policy STD-VAN-076-P mandates explicit distinction evidence for duplicate-looking invoices.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Open blocker on invoice status field requires resolution before AP release.

final_answer: The action may not proceed. INV-VAN-076 is a duplicate-looking invoice for a milestone/release already paid per MS-VAN-076 and PRIOR-VAN-076. Policy STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction evidence, specifically credit/reversal status, which is missing in INV-VAN-076. This unresolved duplicate invoice boundary blocks AP release.
open_blockers: No distinguishing credit/reversal status in INV-VAN-076
Duplicate invoice boundary requires resolution before AP release
